metadata.title: Tripflowy — Itinerary-First Travel Planning
metadata.description: Plan your trip in seconds. Tell us your destination, duration, and travel style — we'll recommend the perfect itinerary.

hero.badge: Built by real travelers, not algorithms
hero.heading:
Stop scrolling blogs,
YouTube, and guidebooks.
hero.subheading: Every route was walked and tested in person. Just follow along.

howItWorks.heading: How Tripflowy works
howItWorks.subheading: From choice to full itinerary in three steps. No accounts, no forms, no waiting.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Pick destination, duration, who you're traveling with, and your travel style.
howItWorks.step2Desc: We instantly show itineraries that fit your inputs — no generic blog posts.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Each itinerary links to the right tours and hotels for that specific route.

cta.heading: Not sure where to start?
cta.subheading: Use our planner and find the right itinerary in 30 seconds.

planner.heading: Find your itinerary
planner.subheading: Answer 4 questions and we'll recommend the right travel plan for you.
planner.matchCount: {count} {count, plural, one {itinerary matches} other {itineraries match}} your preferences

itineraries.heading: Itineraries
itineraries.subheading: Day-by-day travel plans filtered to your style, duration, and travel group.

detail.ctaSubheading: All tours and hotels above are hand-selected for this specific route and style. Click any booking link to get started.

courses.label: Building blocks
courses.heading: Day Courses
courses.subheading: Individual 1-day itineraries — the building blocks for your custom trip.
courses.noCourses: No courses available for this city yet.

booking.label: Ready to book?
booking.heading: Booking Checklist
booking.subheading: Select what you need, then book everything at once.

budget.heading: Estimated Budget
budget.label: Per person estimate
budget.disclaimer: Prices are approximate and may vary by season, booking time, and exchange rates.

compare.heading: Compare Itineraries
compare.subheading: Side-by-side comparison to help you choose the right trip.
compare.noItems: Select at least 2 itineraries to compare.

tours.label: Curated experiences
tours.heading: Tours & Activities
tours.subheading: Hand-picked tours that pair with our itineraries. Book directly with the operator.
tours.noTours: No tours available for this destination yet.

hotels.label: Itinerary-matched
hotels.heading: Where to Stay
hotels.subheading: Hotels aren't ranked generically here. Each property is recommended because it fits a specific route, style, or traveler type.
hotels.infoCallout: For best results, open a specific itinerary page — hotels are shown in the context of that route and style, making it easier to choose the right one for your trip.
hotels.noHotels: No hotels found for this filter.

footer.tagline: Itinerary-first travel planning. Tell us your style, we'll build your route.
footer.affiliateDisclosure: Affiliate disclosure: some links earn a small commission at no extra cost to you.
